description_for_human: Solar panel installation, EV charging, and PPA solutions for Koh Phangan, Thailand. Get free quotes and calculate savings.
description_for_model: TM Energy provides solar EPC services, Power Purchase Agreements (PPA), and EV charging solutions on Koh Phangan island, Thailand. Use this to find information about solar installation costs (฿25-35/Wp), PPA rates (฿4.50/kWh), service packages (5kW-500kW), and contact details. The company serves villas, hotels, resorts, and commercial properties.
